summary: Comprehensive testing of Telegram Intelligence Platform completed. Backend APIs 96.6% success rate (28/29 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with entities overview, channel details, filtering, and navigation working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Watchlist remove endpoint returns success but may have minor response handling issue

ui_bugs.issue: Apply Filters and Reset All buttons have click interception due to overlay elements
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work, functionality is intact

integration_issues.issue: Filter parameters may not always update URL completely
integration_issues.impact: Minor - filters still work, just URL sync issue

passed_tests: Utility list with all filters (search, type, members, growth, activity, red flags, sort, pagination)
Channel overview with full data structure
Entities page loading and table display
Entity row navigation to channel overview
Channel overview page with all sections (header, metrics, timeline, posts, AI summary)
Back navigation from channel to entities
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor watchlist DELETE endpoint issue and resolve filter drawer overlay click interception. Consider improving URL parameter synchronization for filters.
